name: Kitty Litter Mobile Pairing (Alleycat)
description: Pair the Kitty Litter iOS app directly with Personal Agent using a PA-owned Alleycat-compatible host and Codex-shaped conversation APIs.

services.title: Kitty Litter companion host
services.description: Runs the PA-owned Alleycat-compatible host while the extension is enabled.

settingsComponent.label: Kitty Litter Mobile Pairing
settingsComponent.description: Scan a PA-owned pairing QR from the Kitty Litter iOS app. Do not run npx kittylitter.
